ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the customer */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Whether the customer is self-employed */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who applied for the loan */,
  "applicant_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the primary applicant */,
  "coapplicant_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the co-applicant */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_amount_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Credit history of the applicant (0 for no history, 1 for good history) */,
  "property_area" TEXT /* Area where the property is located (e.g., Urban, Semiurban, Rural) */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., Y for approved, N for rejected) */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "application_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the application */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_property_area FOREIGN KEY ("property_area") REFERENCES property_areas ("area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the loan officer (e.g., loan officer, underwriter, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the loan officer belongs to */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the loan officer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the officer was hired */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application being reviewed */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the loan officer during the review */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the loan officer (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current status of the review */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date for the next review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., Personal Loan, Home Loan, Business Loan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  "max_loan_amount" INTEGER /* Maximum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "min_loan_amount" INTEGER /* Minimum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Typical term for the loan type in months */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the property area (e.g., Urban, Semiurban, Rural) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property area */,
  "property_value_range" TEXT /* Typical value range of properties in the area */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the area */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate for properties in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)
